summaries.title: SUPERROO_VAULT_KEY missing from PM2 env - readEnvValue() fallback fix
summaries.summary: A PM2 ecosystem config error caused a 500 error because `SUPERROO_VAULT_KEY` was set using `process.env.SUPERROO_VAULT_KEY || ""`, which only reads from the shell environment, not the `.env` file. The fix added `readEnvValue("SUPERROO_VAULT_KEY")` as a fallback, matching the pattern already used for `PGPASSWORD`. The key takeaway is to always use `readEnvValue()` as a fallback for any env var in PM2 configs that exists in the `.env` file but may not be in the shell environment.
